properties.description: Detects accounts that have been inactive for 30 or more days suddenly signing in. May indicate compromised credentials or unauthorised account reactivation. Maps to MITRE ATT&CK T1078 - Valid Accounts.
properties.query:
let lookbackPeriod = 14d;
let recentWindow = 1d;
let activeUsers = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookbackPeriod)
| where TimeGenerated < ago(recentWindow)
| where ResultType == 0
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(recentWindow)
| where ResultType == 0
| summarize
    RecentSignIn = max(TimeGenerated),
    IPAddresses = make_set(IPAddress),
    Locations = make_set(Location),
    Apps = make_set(AppDisplayName)
    by UserPrincipalName
| join kind=inner activeUsers on UserPrincipalName
| extend DaysDormant = datetime_diff('day', RecentSignIn, LastSeen)
| where DaysDormant >= 30
| extend
    MITRETechnique = "T1078 - Valid Accounts",
    RiskLevel = iff(DaysDormant >= 90, "Critical", "High")
| project
    UserPrincipalName,
    DaysDormant,
    LastSeenBefore = LastSeen,
    RecentSignIn,
    IPAddresses,
    Locations,
    Apps,
    MITRETechnique,
    RiskLevel
| order by DaysDormant desc
